member.name: T:Prime.Kernel.BypassHandler
member.summary: This class handles the logic of the current instance bypass. Current reasons in order of priority: [1] BypassPort's parameter value >= 0; [2] Simba's bypass. This will set the port=[1].

member.name: P:Prime.Kernel.BypassHandler.BypassPort
member.summary: Gets the BypassPort number.

member.name: P:Prime.Kernel.BypassHandler.IsBypass
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the test instance is bypassed or not.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.BypassHandler.ResolveInstanceBypassFromParameters(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Resolves if the current instance has to be bypassed or not due to: - BypassPort parameter.

member.name: T:Prime.Kernel.CurrentCallingPathProvider
member.summary: Current Calling Path Provider.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.CurrentCallingPathProvider.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Prime.Kernel.CurrentCallingPathProvider.CallingPath
member.summary: Gets or sets the calling path of current execution instance.

member.name: T:Prime.Kernel.IKernelSharedStorage
member.summary: The kernel SharedStorage interface.

member.name: P:Prime.Kernel.IKernelSharedStorage.SharedStorageLock
member.summary: Gets or sets the lock object for accessing the Kernel SharedStorage.

member.name: P:Prime.Kernel.IKernelSharedStorage.IsAnyCsDllLoaded
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether any C# dlls were loaded already to indicate if just started loading process.

member.name: P:Prime.Kernel.IKernelSharedStorage.LoadedDebugTestMethodDllContainers
member.summary: Gets or sets list of loaded TestMethodDllContainer. A DllContainer per each dll compiled in Debug mode, to allow Dynamic Reload.

member.name: P:Prime.Kernel.IKernelSharedStorage.LoadedInstancesPerTestMethodDll
member.summary: Gets or sets list of loaded instances per dll name.

member.name: P:Prime.Kernel.IKernelSharedStorage.GlobalTelemetryConsumer
member.summary: Gets the global logger of this AppDomain.

member.name: P:Prime.Kernel.IKernelSharedStorage.GlobalLoggerSessionId
member.summary: Gets the global logger session ID.

member.name: P:Prime.Kernel.IKernelSharedStorage.PrimeTempDllContainer
member.summary: Gets or sets the "PrimeTempDllContainer" for the loading sequence. This DllContainer will be deleted right after the loading sequence ended.

member.name: P:Prime.Kernel.IKernelSharedStorage.LoadedReleaseTestMethodsDllsContainer
member.summary: Gets or sets the "LoadedReleaseTestMethodsDllsContainer" for the loading sequence. This DllContainer will contain all the dlls that were compiled in Release mode.

member.name: P:Prime.Kernel.IKernelSharedStorage.IsSingleAppDomain
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the TP is loaded as Single AppDomain or Multi AppDomain.

member.name: P:Prime.Kernel.IKernelSharedStorage.MefExportsAsDictionary
member.summary: Gets or sets . The Key is the Service interface type and the value is the Service implementaion.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.IKernelSharedStorage.FlushAndShutdownTelemetryConsumer
member.summary: Gracefully shuts down the telemetry loggers.

member.name: T:Prime.Kernel.ITestMethodDllContainer
member.summary: The TestMethod dll container. TOS3 container will be the AppDomain of the TM. TOS4 container will be the Assembly of the TM.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.ITestMethodDllContainer.LoadAssembly(System.String)
member.summary: Load an assembly from the current container.
member.param: the dll full path to load.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.ITestMethodDllContainer.Unload
member.summary: Unload the dll container.
member.returns: boolean value indicating whether the unload succeeded or not.

member.name: T:Prime.Kernel.IUserCodeDllHandler
member.summary: UserCode Dll Handler interface.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.IUserCodeDllHandler.CheckIfModifiedUserCodeDll(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer,System.DateTime)
member.summary: return True if is a user code dll and the sub-system is enabled and the dll was modified from last load.
member.param: The timestamp of the loaded dll.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.IUserCodeDllHandler.Copy(System.String)
member.summary: Copy the dll from its remote path to load path.
member.param: Full Path to copy the dll to (including dll name).

member.name: T:Prime.Kernel.KernelHelper
member.summary: The interface for tor Kernel helper classes per TOS3 and TOS4.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Prime.Kernel.KernelHelper.InstanceParameters
member.summary: Gets or sets the InstanceParameters of the instance.

member.name: P:Prime.Kernel.KernelHelper.BinDir
member.summary: Gets the TOS bin dir.

member.name: P:Prime.Kernel.KernelHelper.TestMethodNameSpace
member.summary: Gets the TM namespace.

member.name: P:Prime.Kernel.KernelHelper.InstanceName
member.summary: Gets the instance name.

member.name: P:Prime.Kernel.KernelHelper.DllName
member.summary: Gets the dll name.

member.name: P:Prime.Kernel.KernelHelper.DllFullPathToLoad
member.summary: Gets the dll full path to load from.

member.name: P:Prime.Kernel.KernelHelper.LoadedDllTimeStamp
member.summary: Gets or sets the timestamp of the loaded dll.

member.name: P:Prime.Kernel.KernelHelper.TestMethodName
member.summary: Gets The TM name.

member.name: P:Prime.Kernel.KernelHelper.KernelSharedStorage
member.summary: Gets or sets The KernelSharedStorage instance.

member.name: P:Prime.Kernel.KernelHelper.IsDebug
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether running in debug LogLevel or not.

member.name: P:Prime.Kernel.KernelHelper.WinLogger
member.summary: Gets or sets the WinLogger object.

member.name: P:Prime.Kernel.KernelHelper.IsDebugDll
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether this dll compiled in Debug mode.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.KernelHelper.UnloadDebugTestMethodDll(System.String)
member.summary: Unload a Test Methods dll.
member.param: the name of the dll to unload.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.KernelHelper.CreateTestInstanceObjectFromDll(System.Func{Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer})
member.summary: Create new TestInstance.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.KernelHelper.LoadSequenceCompleted(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Mark the load sequence as completed.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.KernelHelper.DisposeTestInstance
member.summary: Unload a single TestInstance.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.KernelHelper.PostVerify
member.summary: Do the PostVerify work per TOS version.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.KernelHelper.PreExecute(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: PreExecute.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.KernelHelper.PostExecute(System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: PostExecute. Once all service from AnchorService's PostExecuteLegacy migrated then add all of them to the kernel's PostExecute and delete the KernelHelper.PostExecute function.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.KernelHelper.HandleBypass(System.Int32)
member.summary: HandleBypass.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.KernelHelper.GetSimbaBypass(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: GetSimbaBypass.
member.param: The session context of this operation.
member.returns: If is bypass and the port in case simba has the current instance to be bypassed.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.KernelHelper.PrintDllInformation(System.Tuple{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Print the dll information for the load.

member.name: T:Prime.Kernel.Tos3KernelHelper
member.summary: TOS3 KernelHelper.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.Tos3KernelHelper.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.Tos3KernelHelper.CreateTestInstanceObjectFromDll(System.Func{Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer})
member.summary: Create new Test Instance in a target AppDomain. AppDomain logic: 1. Load the dll into "PrimeTemp" AppDomain - the temp AppDomain will always be unloaded at the end of the load sequence. 2. Once dll was loaded into "PrimeTemp" check if it was compiled in Debug or in Release mode. 2.a. If Release mode => load the dll into the "Prime" AppDomain. Dlls in this AppDomain will not be checked for Dynamic Reload. 2.b. If Debug mode => load the dll into a separated AppDomain to allow Dynamic Reload later. 3. Load the dll to the AppDomain decided in step #2. 4. Create the Test Instance from the loaded dll in step #3.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.Tos3KernelHelper.UnRegisterSessionContext(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Unregisters the adHoc providers created on the fly.

member.name: T:Prime.Kernel.KernelSharedStorage
member.summary: Common storage for all kernel instances to manage the loaded AppDomains and instances.

member.name: P:Prime.Kernel.KernelSharedStorage.SharedStorageLock
member.summary: Gets or sets the lock object for accessing the Kernel SharedStorage.

member.name: P:Prime.Kernel.KernelSharedStorage.IsAnyCsDllLoaded
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether any C# dlls were loaded already to indicate if just started loading process.

member.name: P:Prime.Kernel.KernelSharedStorage.LoadedDebugTestMethodDllContainers
member.summary: Gets or sets list of loaded TestMethodDllContainer.

member.name: P:Prime.Kernel.KernelSharedStorage.LoadedInstancesPerTestMethodDll
member.summary: Gets or sets list of loaded instances per AppDomain.

member.name: P:Prime.Kernel.KernelSharedStorage.GlobalTelemetryConsumer
member.summary: Gets the global logger of this AppDomain.

member.name: P:Prime.Kernel.KernelSharedStorage.GlobalLoggerSessionId
member.summary: Gets the global logger session ID.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.KernelSharedStorage.GetKernelSharedStorage
member.summary: Get the KernelSharedStorage singleton.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.KernelSharedStorage.CreateGlobalTelemetryConsumer
member.summary: Create the global consumer logger.

member.name: T:Prime.Kernel.PerInstanceProfiler
member.summary: Profiles the test time and private bytes per test instance.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.PerInstanceProfiler.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class for the given instance name.
member.param: The name of the current instance.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.PerInstanceProfiler.DatalogAsync
member.summary: Stops the profiler for the current instance at the end of current instance's Execute.

member.name: T:Prime.Kernel.PrimeKernel
member.summary: The prime kernel class - this is the heart class of Prime C# loading and execution.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.PrimeKernel.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: TOS bin dir - where TOS copy the DLLs into at pre-load.
The name of the test class as appears in the PH file.
The name of the current instance.
The name of the dll contains this the Test Method code itself.

member.name: P:Prime.Kernel.PrimeKernel.KernelHelper
member.summary: Gets or sets the kernelHelper for this instance.

member.name: P:Prime.Kernel.PrimeKernel.TestInstance
member.summary: Gets or sets the concrete test instance.

member.name: P:Prime.Kernel.PrimeKernel.InstanceLogger
member.summary: Gets or sets the instance logger.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.PrimeKernel.Load(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: CreateGlobalLogger the concrete instance during TP load.
member.param: pairs of instance name and its value.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.PrimeKernel.Verify(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Boolean)
member.summary: The verify function Execute the Verify stage with the instance parameters. The entry points for this functions are: [1] The bPostInit (PrimeInstance.cpp) on a call from the HdmtApi::VerifyInstance or the `Verify` on the GUI. In this case, the calledByExecute=false. [2] The bExecute (PrimeInstance.cpp) on the case of "m_pIHdmtTest->GetDirtyFlagValue()" is true. In this case, the calledByExecute=true.
member.param: pairs of instance name and its value.
true if Verify called by execute.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.PrimeKernel.Execute(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String})
member.summary: The execute function. Execute the Test Method execution and handle the exceptions.
member.returns: instance exit port and Bypass status.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.PrimeKernel.Unload
member.summary: Trigger unload of the whole Prime Will destroy all instances and unload all AppDomains.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.PrimeKernel.AlarmTriggeredDuringVerify
member.summary: Query the Kernel if an alarm has been triggered during the latest execution of .
member.returns: A value indicating if an alarm occurred during verify.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.PrimeKernel.UnloadTestInstance(Prime.Kernel.PrimeKernel)
member.summary: Unload a concrete test instance from a PrimeKernel instance.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.PrimeKernel.InitializeServiceStore
member.summary: Initialize the Service Store = load all the services implementations dlls. Making this as a standalone function in order o mock it for UT and skip the ServiceStore initialization.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.PrimeKernel.CreateUserCodeDllHandler(System.String)
member.summary: Create a user code dll handler for a given dll.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.PrimeKernel.CreateTestInstance
member.summary: Create new instance at the target AppDomain.
member.returns: The new created test instance marshaled to the target AppDomain.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.PrimeKernel.InitializeSessionContext
member.summary: Initialize the session context from all sessionContextProvidables services.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.PrimeKernel.RemoveFolderAndFiles(System.String)
member.summary: help function to cleanup of all files and folder recursively in prime's temp folder.
member.param: path to delete the file and folders from.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.PrimeKernel.CreateSessionContextProvider
member.summary: Create an ISessionContextProviderContainer for a TM that requires it in its CTOR DI.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.PrimeKernel.InnerVerify(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Boolean)
member.summary: The entry points for this functions are: [1] The Kernel.Verify, which the calledByExecute's value will depend on who the caller of the Kernel.Verify. [2] The Kernel.Execute, when the Kernel.IsTestInstanceUndefined(). In this case the calledByExecute=true.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.PrimeKernel.SetProfileMode
member.summary: SetProfileMode.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.PrimeKernel.SetPerformanceProfile(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: SetPerformanceProfile.

member.name: T:Prime.Kernel.RemotingSponsor
member.summary: Sponsor class in order to get infinite time for the marshal object that will register to it. Marshal objects have time out for the connection between the real object to the ref object, by using external sponsor the connection will we override the timeout until we will unregister the sponsor see https://msdn.microsoft.com/en-us/magazine/cc300474.aspx for more details.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.RemotingSponsor.#ctor(System.MarshalByRefObject)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.RemotingSponsor.Finalize
member.summary: Finalizes an instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.RemotingSponsor.Renewal(System.Runtime.Remoting.Lifetime.ILease)
member.summary: Implementation function of ISponsor interface: Requests a sponsoring client to renew the lease for the specified object.
member.param: The lifetime lease of the object that requires lease renewal.
member.returns: The additional lease time for the specified object.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.RemotingSponsor.InitializeLifetimeService
member.summary: override function from MarshalByRefObject: Obtains a lifetime service object to control the lifetime policy for this instance.
member.returns: An object of type System.Runtime.Remoting.Lifetime.ILease used to control the lifetime policy for this instance.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.RemotingSponsor.Dispose
member.summary: Dispose function to release the unmanaged remote resources.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.RemotingSponsor.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Dispose function to release the unmanaged remote resources.

member.name: T:Prime.Kernel.Telemetry.TelemetryMessages
member.summary: Kernel logger messages.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.Telemetry.TelemetryMessages.LogKernelExecuted(MPE.MIT.Logging.ILogger,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Log kernel executed.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.Telemetry.TelemetryMessages.LogKernelVerified(MPE.MIT.Logging.ILogger,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Log kernel verified.

member.name: T:Prime.Kernel.Telemetry.TelemetryPerformanceScopes
member.summary: Logger performance scopes.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.Telemetry.TelemetryPerformanceScopes.GetExecutePerformanceScope(MPE.MIT.Logging.ILogger,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Get kernel execute performance scope.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.Telemetry.TelemetryPerformanceScopes.GetVerifyPerformanceScope(MPE.MIT.Logging.ILogger,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Get kernel verify performance scope.
member.param: Indicate this verify was called from an execute.

member.name: T:Prime.Kernel.UserCodeDllHandler
member.summary: Handles the user code dll reload logic.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.UserCodeDllHandler.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.UserCodeDllHandler.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Prime.Kernel.WinLogger
member.summary: WinLogger class to log information to HdmtApp console and to WinEvent when ConsoleService not necessary available.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.WinLogger.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.WinLogger.Log(System.String,System.Diagnostics.EventLogEntryType)
member.summary: Log information to WindowEvent logger and to the HdmtApp.exe Console. Use this when ConsoleService is not necessary available.
